 ## Event bus
 
 Internal pub/sub over Redis.
+
+## Webhook delivery
+
+Outgoing webhooks use exponential backoff:
+
+| Attempt | Delay   |
+|---------|--------|
+| 1       | 1s     |
+| 2       | 4s     |
+| 3       | 16s    |
+| 4       | 64s    |
+| 5       | give up|
